title: Our Lady of the Immaculate Conception Church
tagline: Our Lady of the Immaculate Conception Church — spiritual town of Goa

heroImage.alt: Our Lady of the Immaculate Conception Church, Goa

overview.short: The Our Lady of the Immaculate Conception Church (Portuguese: Igreja de Nossa Senhora da Imaculada Conceição) is located in Panjim, Goa, India.
overview.description: The Our Lady of the Immaculate Conception Church (Portuguese: Igreja de Nossa Senhora da Imaculada Conceição) is located in Panjim, Goa, India. The Church conducts Mass every day in English, Konkani, and Portuguese. The colonial Portuguese Baroque style church was first built in 1541 as a chapel on a hill side overlooking the city of Panaji .It was eventually replaced by a larger church in the 1600s as part of Portuguese Goa's religious expansion. This church houses the ancient bell that was removed from the Augustinian ruins of the Church of Our Lady of Grace (Portuguese: Nossa Senhora da Gra

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Panaji
topPlaces.description: Panaji (formerly Nova Goa; ; Goan Konkani: Ponnjem, IPA: [pɵɳd͡ʑɛ̃] ; Portuguese: Pangim), also known as Panjim, is the capital of the Indian state of Goa and the headquarters of the North Goa district. It was previously the territorial capital of the former Portuguese India (Estado da Índia).

topPlaces.name: Goa
topPlaces.description: Goa ( GOH-ə; Konkani: [ɡɔ̃j]; Portuguese: [ˈɡoɐ] ) is a state on the southwestern coast of India within the Konkan region. It is geographically separated from the Deccan highlands by the Western Ghats.

topPlaces.name: Mhamai Kamat House
topPlaces.description: The Mhamai Kamat House is a historic 18th-century residence and former bead factory located in Panaji, Goa. Housing the Mhamai Kamat family, the house has served as a significant landmark of Goan heritage, commerce, and culture.

topPlaces.name: Calvim
topPlaces.description: Calvim is an island village situated in the Bardez sub-district or taluka of Goa. It is in the vicinity of the prominent Aldona village.

topPlaces.name: Adil Shah Palace
topPlaces.description: Adil Shah Palace, also known as the Idalcão Palace or the Old Secretariat, is a historic landmark located in Panaji, Goa. It is the oldest surviving colonial-era building in the city.

topPlaces.name: Mermaid Garden
topPlaces.description: Mermaid Garden, also known as Jardim da Sereia, is a public park and heritage site located in Campal locality of Panaji, the capital of Goa, India.

topPlaces.name: Fontainhas (quarter)
topPlaces.description: Fontainhas (Portuguese: Bairro das Fontainhas) is an old Latin quarter in Panjim, capital city of the state of Goa, India. It maintains its Portuguese influence, particularly through its architecture, which includes narrow and picturesque winding streets like those found in many European cities, old villas and buildings with projecting balconies painted in the traditional tones of pale yellow, green, or blue, and roofs made of red coloured tiles.

topPlaces.name: Azad Maidan (public square)
topPlaces.description: Azad Maidan (formerly Square of the Seven Windows; Portuguese: Praça de Sete Janelas) is a public square in the Indian state of Panaji, Goa. It is located opposite the Goa Police headquarters on the Mahatma Gandhi Road, Panaji.

items.note: Panaji (formerly Nova Goa; ; Goan Konkani: Ponnjem, IPA: [pɵɳd͡ʑɛ̃] ; Portuguese: Pangim), also known as Panjim, is the capital of the Indian state of Goa and the headquarters of the North Goa district. It was previously the territorial capital of the former Portuguese India (Estado da Índia).

Goa ( GOH-ə; Konkani: [ɡɔ̃j]; Portuguese: [ˈɡoɐ] ) is a state on the southwestern coast of India within the Konkan region. It is geographically separated from the Deccan highlands by the Western Ghats.

The Mhamai Kamat House is a historic 18th-century residence and former bead factory located in Panaji, Goa. Housing the Mhamai Kamat family, the house has served as a significant landmark of Goan heritage, commerce, and culture.
Calvim is an island village situated in the Bardez sub-district or taluka of Goa. It is in the vicinity of the prominent Aldona village.
Adil Shah Palace, also known as the Idalcão Palace or the Old Secretariat, is a historic landmark located in Panaji, Goa. It is the oldest surviving colonial-era building in the city.
Mermaid Garden, also known as Jardim da Sereia, is a public park and heritage site located in Campal locality of Panaji, the capital of Goa, India.

Fontainhas (Portuguese: Bairro das Fontainhas) is an old Latin quarter in Panjim, capital city of the state of Goa, India. It maintains its Portuguese influence, particularly through its architecture, which includes narrow and picturesque winding streets like those found in many European cities, old villas and buildings with projecting balconies painted in the traditional tones of pale yellow, green, or blue, and roofs made of red coloured tiles.

Azad Maidan (formerly Square of the Seven Windows; Portuguese: Praça de Sete Janelas) is a public square in the Indian state of Panaji, Goa. It is located opposite the Goa Police headquarters on the Mahatma Gandhi Road, Panaji.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Our Lady of the Immaculate Conception Church?
faq.a: The best time to visit Our Lady of the Immaculate Conception Church is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Our Lady of the Immaculate Conception Church?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Goa International Airport, Dabolim (13 km) and the nearest railway station is Vasco da Gama (Goa) (11 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Our Lady of the Immaculate Conception Church?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Our Lady of the Immaculate Conception Church at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Our Lady of the Immaculate Conception Church?
faq.a: Stays in Our Lady of the Immaculate Conception Church start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Our Lady of the Immaculate Conception Church?
faq.a: The top attractions are Panaji, Goa, Mhamai Kamat House, Calvim, Adil Shah Palace.
